taxonomy: Panicularia erecta is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Panicularia, which is a group of grasses commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The family Poaceae, also known as the grass family, is one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants. Panicularia erecta is further classified as a member of the order Poales, which includes a wide range of grasses and other monocotyledonous plants. This classification helps to identify and categorize the plant within the broader context of plant taxonomy.
